message:
test(fcp-host): add agent integration tests for discovery and introspection

Add comprehensive integration tests verifying agent-facing schemas
include all required fields and proper MCP mapping:

- MockConnectorRegistry: Test fixture for simulating connector registry
  with configurable operations and introspection data
- MockConnectorData: Encapsulates summary, introspection, archetype,
  and rate limits for test connectors
- Verify agent-facing schemas include:
  - CapabilityId with proper string representation
  - RiskLevel enum values (Low, Medium, High, Critical)
  - SafetyTier enum values (Safe, Risky, Dangerous, etc.)
  - IdempotencyClass (None, BestEffort, Strict)
  - ApprovalMode (None, Policy, Interactive, ElevationToken)
  - AgentHint with when_to_use, common_mistakes, examples, related

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
